place: Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Sea-View Villa with Infinity Pool - Koh Samui
blurb: A brand-new three-to-four-bedroom villa set into a quiet hillside on Koh Samui's northern coast, its glass-walled living spaces opening onto a private 10-metre infinity pool and open views of the Gulf. Delivered fully furnished on a freehold Chanote plot — off-plan from ฿26,000,000.
detail:
Tucked into a private residential hillside on the calmer northern side of Koh Samui, this brand-new villa trades the bustle of the island's busier shores for quiet, elevation and an uninterrupted line of sight to the sea. A gentle final approach, best taken by 4x4, keeps the setting private and the outlook clear across the water.

The architecture is clean-lined and contemporary, arranged over three levels and built around the view. A flexible layout is offered as either three or four bedrooms — each with its own ensuite bathroom, rain shower, air conditioning and generous glazing that pulls the sea into the room. Interiors run to roughly 366 m² on a private plot of about 1,037 m², finished in a restrained palette of natural materials.

At the heart of the home, an open-plan living, dining and kitchen space flows out to a wide terrace. The kitchen is fully fitted with an island, oven, electric cooktop and full-size fridge, while the dining table seats six. Outside, a 10-by-4-metre infinity pool appears to spill toward the horizon, framed by tropical greenery and the Gulf beyond — the setting for long lunches and Koh Samui's evening light. A dedicated gym and a separate staff room complete the plan, and two covered parking spaces sit at the entrance.

Offered off-plan and delivered fully furnished, down to the furniture and linens. Ownership is freehold under a Chanote title, with construction taking approximately 18 months from reservation. Two configurations are available: three bedrooms from ฿26,000,000 and four bedrooms at ฿28,000,000.

features.l: Open Gulf sea views · hillside setting
